candidate_problems.text: What precise dynamical principle or mathematical mechanism makes gravity couple only to an emergent residual of vacuum structure rather than to the additive zero-point stress-energy computed in QFT? This is the core unresolved tension because the conjecture currently redescribes the problem at a systems level without yet specifying a falsifiable coupling law, constraint equation, or consistency condition that reproduces GR/QFT successes while suppressing vacuum gravitation.

How can global feedback, horizon/information bounds, or cosmological boundary conditions influence local curvature in a way that is compatible with locality, causality, diffeomorphism invariance, and the Bianchi identities? The conjecture leans on whole-system regulation, but it remains open whether such top-down constraints can be implemented without hidden nonlocality, acausality, or conflict with standard conservation structure.

What distinctive observational signatures would separate an emergent feedback-regulated residual cosmological constant from an ordinary constant Lambda or quintessence-like dark energy? If the proposal is worth developing as physics rather than metaphor, it needs new testable consequences—e.g. specific predictions for equation-of-state deviations, horizon-scale correlations, structure growth, vacuum response to phase transitions, or links between dark energy and entropy/information measures.
